case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. PRICE, BRANDI AKA BRANDI J PRICE ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT PRICE, BRANDI AKA BRANDI J PRICE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-22-2016

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 57869509), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK SERVED SEP-09-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PRICE, BRANDI AKA BRANDI J PRICE

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $296.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $1,500.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 58211851) AS TO DEFENDANT PRICE, BRANDI AKA BRANDI J PRICE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRICE, BRANDI AKA BRANDI J PRICE $6,327.46 PRINCIPAL, $296.50 COSTS, $1,500.00 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,123.96, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 58211851)
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B); VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 58011481) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 58211851) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
